title: Merge K Sorted Arrays
input_format: An array of `k` arrays of integers, each sorted in ascending order.
output_format: A single sorted array containing all the elements.
constraints:
- `k == arrays.length`
- `0 <= k <= 10^4`
- `0 <= arrays[i].length <= 500`
- `-10^4 <= arrays[i][j] <= 10^4`
- `arrays[i]` is sorted in ascending order.
- The sum of `arrays[i].length` will not exceed `10^4`.
